dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The previous failure in the context loader has been resolved. The 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' steps both successfully validated their schemas, ensuring governance constraints were properly ingested and applied.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows deep analytical processing, particularly in the 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' phase which utilized over 7,000 completion tokens to map dependencies and impacts.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: With the restoration of governance context, the 'alignment-engine' and 'architecture-intent-generator' are now able to reconcile technical goals against regulatory constraints, providing a more complete tension analysis than the baseline.
